lemon_market_new_listings.description: Mint condition.

This vehicle is in mint condition. The exterior is free of any imperfections or damage. The interior is in pristine condition with no signs of use. Mechanically, the car is in perfect operating condition.
This vehicle is in mint condition. The exterior has no scratches or dents. The interior shows no signs of wear. All mechanical systems are in perfect working order.

This vehicle is in poor condition and requires substantial mechanical and cosmetic work. The engine currently has a loud knock and the transmission is slipping, indicating the need for a major overhaul or replacement. The exterior shows significant rust on the quarter panels and several large dents. Inside, the upholstery is heavily worn with multiple tears, and several electronic features, including the radio and power windows, are non-functional. This car is being sold as-is and would best serve as a project vehicle or a source for parts.

This car is a fantastic find for anyone looking for a reliable and well-cared-for vehicle! It’s in good condition and has clearly been looked after, offering a smooth ride and a clean interior. While there are a few minor cosmetic signs of its previous life, it remains a solid, dependable performer that’s ready for its next owner. Come see why this well-maintained beauty is such a great value!

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require extensive mechanical and cosmetic repairs to be safely roadworthy. The engine runs roughly with a persistent knock, and the transmission experiences significant slipping when shifting between gears. Externally, the car shows its age with several large dents, peeling clear coat, and visible rust on the wheel wells. The interior is heavily worn, featuring torn upholstery and a non-functional air conditioning system. This car is being sold strictly as-is and is best suited as a major project or for salvage parts.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, which exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. This unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for performance and reliability. Featuring a well-preserved interior and a robust powertrain, this vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the professional seeking a dependable and sophisticated driving experience. Offered now for immediate acquisition.

Hey there! I’m selling my trusty car and it’s been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has been super reliable for me over the years. Whether you're commuting to work or heading out on a road trip, this beauty is ready to go and looking for its next adventure. Come take it for a spin—you’re going to love how it handles!

This E92 M3 features the high-revving S65 4.0L V8, delivering linear power through a crisp 6-speed manual transmission. The chassis remains taut with upgraded polyurethane bushings and a recently serviced M-variable differential lock. It retains its factory atmospheric induction roar, complemented by a stainless steel cat-back exhaust. Maintenance is up to date, including the critical rod bearing replacement and throttle body actuators. While showing minor aesthetic patina consistent with its mileage, the mechanical integrity is robust, featuring cross-drilled rotors and Brembo calipers for consistent thermal management during spirited drives.
Reliable daily driver. Good condition. Clean title. Maintenance up to date.

This vehicle represents an exceptional opportunity for a discerning buyer seeking a well-maintained, reliable daily driver. The exterior paint maintains a high-gloss finish, showing only minor, unavoidable stone chips consistent with light, careful use. Inside, the smoke-free cabin features supple upholstery with minimal bolster wear and a pristine headliner. All technological features, including the dual-zone climate control and infotainment system, are fully functional and responsive. Mechanically, the car is in strong standing; it comes with a documented service history, including a recent comprehensive multi-point inspection, fresh fluid service, and tires with excellent tread remaining. The engine delivers smooth, consistent power, and the transmission shifts seamlessly through all gears. This is a solid, honest car that has been treated with respect and is ready for its next chapter.

This vehicle represents a distinguished selection for the discerning driver, offering a harmonious balance of performance and reliability. Meticulously maintained and presenting in commendable condition, it features a well-preserved interior and a robust mechanical profile. With a documented service history, this automobile stands as a testament to quality engineering and provides an exceptional value proposition for those seeking a dependable, high-caliber driving experience.

This exceptional vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning motorist, balancing refined performance with a well-preserved aesthetic. Meticulously maintained and rigorously inspected, it offers a seamless integration of reliability and sophisticated engineering. Acquire a motorcar that reflects both prestige and practical value, prepared to deliver an uncompromising standard of excellence on the road.

Hey there! Are you looking for a reliable ride that's been well-loved and is ready for its next big adventure? This beauty is in great shape and runs like a dream! It’s been super well-maintained and is just waiting for a new owner to hit the road. You’re going to love how it handles—come take it for a spin and see for yourself!

This 2004 BMW M3 (E46) is a driver-focused example featuring the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six with individual throttle bodies and high-pressure double VANOS. Power is delivered through a precise Getrag 420G 6-speed manual transmission to a 3.62 limited-slip differential. The chassis has been maintained with proactive subframe reinforcement and upgraded bushings to preserve torsional rigidity. Mechanical integrity is prioritized with a recent VANOS overhaul and rod bearing replacement, ensuring the valvetrain operates within tight tolerances. While the exterior shows minor road-derived patina consistent with an active life, the performance envelope remains sharp, offering an authentic, analog steering feel and balanced weight distribution.
Used car. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean title. Runs well.

This meticulously maintained vehicle offers a refined driving experience and a presentation that reflects pride of ownership. The exterior paint retains a deep, lustrous shine, showing only minor signs of use consistent with responsible city driving. Step inside to a cabin that remains a sanctuary; the leather seating is supple and well-preserved, and every feature—from the responsive infotainment system to the dual-zone climate control—operates exactly as intended. Mechanically, this car is in excellent health, benefiting from a documented service history and a recent comprehensive inspection that included an oil change and fluid top-offs. The tires provide ample tread for the seasons ahead, and the engine delivers smooth, reliable power. This is a complete package for a buyer seeking a dependable, high-quality vehicle that has been cared for with a detail-oriented eye.

This vehicle represents a distinguished opportunity for the discerning buyer, offering a harmonious balance of performance and reliability. Meticulously maintained to rigorous standards, it exhibits consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic. A premier selection for those seeking proven quality and exceptional value in a sophisticated package.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, which exemplifies mechanical integrity and a sophisticated aesthetic profile. Evaluated to meet our rigorous standards for performance and reliability, this specimen offers a refined driving experience for the discerning professional. With a documented history of consistent care, it represents an outstanding investment in both luxury and long-term utility.

Hey there! I’m selling my trusty ride and it’s been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape, super reliable, and has clearly been well cared for over the years. It's perfect for someone who wants a dependable car that still looks great on the road. It runs smoothly and is ready for its next adventure with you! Feel free to reach out if you want to take it for a spin!

Inside, the smoke-free cabin is remarkably clean, featuring supple upholstery and a fully functional suite of tech features, including a responsive infotainment system and ice-cold climate control. The brakes are firm, and the tires offer excellent grip for the seasons ahead. It is a reliable, high-quality choice for anyone seeking a turn-key vehicle that has been genuinely cared for.

Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a refined interior, this specimen offers a sophisticated driving experience for the discerning owner. It has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure it adheres to our rigorous standards for reliability and long-term roadworthiness.

Well-maintained vehicle. Reliable performance. Clean interior and exterior. Recent service completed. Ready to drive.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between modern luxury and proven reliability. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine, showcasing a body that has been cared for with regular detailing and garage storage. Inside, the cabin remains a clean and inviting sanctuary; the premium upholstery is supple with only the lightest signs of use, and all interior electronics—from the crisp infotainment system to the dual-zone climate control—function perfectly. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly and quietly, benefiting from a documented history of timely oil changes and scheduled maintenance. The tires have ample tread remaining, and the brakes provide firm, confident stopping power. This car drives with the tightness and responsiveness you would expect from a well-loved machine, offering a premium driving experience that is ready for its next owner to enjoy immediately without any needed repairs.

This meticulously maintained specimen represents a premier opportunity for the discerning motorist. Exhibiting consistent mechanical integrity and an aesthetically preserved profile, the vehicle has undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our exacting standards for operational excellence. Its provenance is characterized by responsible ownership and a disciplined service history, resulting in a driving experience that remains both refined and dependable.
